KATANA ZERO

You are a samurai assassin with the ability to manipulate time. Navigate through enemy-filled rooms, slashing foes with your katana, dodging bullets, and using your time-slow ability strategically. One hit kills—for you and your enemies. Clear all enemies to progress through increasingly challenging levels. Master timing, positioning, and the art of the blade to survive.

Arrow Keys: Move left/right, crouch (down), look up (up) | Space: Jump | Shift: Dash (fast horizontal movement with brief invincibility) | Z: Slash with katana (hold direction to slash in that direction) | X: Activate time-slow ability (limited duration, recharges between levels) | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
